message:
chore: Bump version to 0.54.1

Retag as v0.54.1 because v0.54.0 tag was poisoned by repeated
delete/recreate cycles and GitHub Actions no longer triggers workflows
for it.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/crew/emma
Rig: beads
Role: crew

files.patch:
@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 {
   "name": "beads",
   "description": "AI-supervised issue tracker for coding workflows. Manage tasks, discover work, and maintain context with simple CLI commands.",
-  "version": "0.54.0",
+  "version": "0.54.1",
   "author": {
     "name": "Steve Yegge",
     "url": "https://github.com/steveyegge"

@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [project]
 name = "beads-mcp"
-version = "0.54.0"
+version = "0.54.1"
 description = "MCP server for beads issue tracker."
 readme = "README.md"
 requires-python = ">=3.10"

@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 {
   "name": "@beads/bd",
-  "version": "0.54.0",
+  "version": "0.54.1",
   "description": "Beads issue tracker - lightweight memory system for coding agents with native binary support",
   "main": "bin/bd.js",
   "bin": {
